import Mathlib

open Real intervalIntegral MeasureTheory

noncomputable def putnam_1987_b1_solution : ℝ := 1

-- Helper definition to keep the integrand readable
private noncomputable def f1987b1 (x : ℝ) : ℝ :=
  Real.sqrt (Real.log (9 - x)) /
    (Real.sqrt (Real.log (9 - x)) + Real.sqrt (Real.log (x + 3)))

theorem putnam_1987_b1 :
    ∫ x in (2 : ℝ)..4,
      Real.sqrt (Real.log (9 - x)) /
        (Real.sqrt (Real.log (9 - x)) + Real.sqrt (Real.log (x + 3)))
      = putnam_1987_b1_solution := by
  -- Strategy: I = ∫f, and substituting x ↦ 6-x gives I = ∫g where g(x) = f(6-x).
  -- f(x) + g(x) = 1 on [2,4], so 2I = 2, hence I = 1.
  have hI : ∫ x in (2:ℝ)..4, f1987b1 x = 1 := by
    -- denote the original integral
    set I : ℝ := ∫ x in (2:ℝ)..4, f1987b1 x with hIdef
    -- The substitution u = 6 - x transforms the integral over [2,4] to itself.
    have hsub : ∫ x in (2:ℝ)..4, f1987b1 (6 - x) = I := by
      have := intervalIntegral.integral_comp_sub_left f1987b1 6
      -- ∫ x in 2..4, f1987b1 (6 - x) = ∫ x in 6-4..6-2, f1987b1 x = ∫ x in 2..4, f1987b1 x
      simpa using this
    -- pointwise sum is 1 on [2,4]
    have hpos : ∀ x ∈ Set.uIcc (2:ℝ) 4,
        Real.sqrt (Real.log (9 - x)) + Real.sqrt (Real.log (x + 3)) > 0 := by
      intro x hx
      rw [Set.uIcc_of_le (by norm_num : (2:ℝ) ≤ 4)] at hx
      obtain ⟨hx1, hx2⟩ := hx
      have h9 : (9 : ℝ) - x ≥ 5 := by linarith
      have hl9 : Real.log (9 - x) ≥ Real.log 5 :=
        Real.log_le_log (by norm_num) h9
      have h5 : Real.log 5 > 0 := Real.log_pos (by norm_num)
      have hl9pos : Real.log (9 - x) > 0 := lt_of_lt_of_le h5 hl9
      have hs9 : Real.sqrt (Real.log (9 - x)) > 0 := Real.sqrt_pos.mpr hl9pos
      have hs3 : Real.sqrt (Real.log (x + 3)) ≥ 0 := Real.sqrt_nonneg _
      linarith
    have hsum : ∀ x ∈ Set.uIcc (2:ℝ) 4, f1987b1 x + f1987b1 (6 - x) = 1 := by
      intro x hx
      have hd := hpos x hx
      simp only [f1987b1]
      have h1 : (9 : ℝ) - (6 - x) = x + 3 := by ring
      have h2 : (6 - x) + 3 = 9 - x := by ring
      rw [h1, h2]
      set a := Real.sqrt (Real.log (9 - x))
      set b := Real.sqrt (Real.log (x + 3))
      have hab : a + b > 0 := hd
      have hba : b + a > 0 := by linarith
      have hne : a + b ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hab
      have hne' : b + a ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hba
      field_simp
      ring
    -- Need integrability on [2,4]
    have hcont : ContinuousOn f1987b1 (Set.Icc (2:ℝ) 4) := by
      apply ContinuousOn.div
      · apply Real.continuous_sqrt.continuousOn.comp
        · exact (continuousOn_const.sub continuousOn_id).log
            (fun x hx => by
              have : (9:ℝ) - x ≥ 5 := by
                rcases hx with ⟨hx1, hx2⟩; linarith
              linarith)
        · intro x _; trivial
      · apply ContinuousOn.add
        · apply Real.continuous_sqrt.continuousOn.comp
          · exact (continuousOn_const.sub continuousOn_id).log
              (fun x hx => by
                rcases hx with ⟨hx1, hx2⟩
                have : (9:ℝ) - x ≥ 5 := by linarith
                linarith)
          · intro x _; trivial
        · apply Real.continuous_sqrt.continuousOn.comp
          · exact (continuousOn_id.add continuousOn_const).log
              (fun x hx => by
                rcases hx with ⟨hx1, hx2⟩
                have : x + 3 ≥ 5 := by linarith
                linarith)
          · intro x _; trivial
      · intro x hx
        have hu : x ∈ Set.uIcc (2:ℝ) 4 := by
          rw [Set.uIcc_of_le (by norm_num : (2:ℝ) ≤ 4)]; exact hx
        exact ne_of_gt (hpos x hu)
    have hint : IntervalIntegrable f1987b1 MeasureTheory.volume 2 4 :=
      hcont.intervalIntegrable_of_Icc (by norm_num)
    -- f(6 - x) is also integrable
    have hcont' : ContinuousOn (fun x => f1987b1 (6 - x)) (Set.Icc (2:ℝ) 4) := by
      apply hcont.comp ((continuousOn_const.sub continuousOn_id))
      intro x hx
      rcases hx with ⟨hx1, hx2⟩
      refine ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩
    have hint' : IntervalIntegrable (fun x => f1987b1 (6 - x)) MeasureTheory.volume 2 4 :=
      hcont'.intervalIntegrable_of_Icc (by norm_num)
    -- 2 I = ∫ (f(x) + f(6-x)) dx = ∫ 1 dx = 2
    have hadd : ∫ x in (2:ℝ)..4, (f1987b1 x + f1987b1 (6 - x)) = I + I := by
      rw [intervalIntegral.integral_add hint hint', hsub]
    have hone : ∫ x in (2:ℝ)..4, (f1987b1 x + f1987b1 (6 - x)) = ∫ x in (2:ℝ)..4, (1:ℝ) := by
      apply intervalIntegral.integral_congr
      intro x hx
      exact hsum x hx
    have hr : ∫ x in (2:ℝ)..4, (1:ℝ) = 2 := by simp
    have : I + I = 2 := by rw [← hadd, hone, hr]
    linarith
  -- Now unfold f1987b1
  have heq : (fun x => Real.sqrt (Real.log (9 - x)) /
        (Real.sqrt (Real.log (9 - x)) + Real.sqrt (Real.log (x + 3)))) = f1987b1 := by
    funext x; rfl
  rw [show (∫ x in (2:ℝ)..4,
      Real.sqrt (Real.log (9 - x)) /
        (Real.sqrt (Real.log (9 - x)) + Real.sqrt (Real.log (x + 3)))) =
      ∫ x in (2:ℝ)..4, f1987b1 x from rfl]
  rw [hI]
  rfl
